title: justicia suratensis
intro: Justicia suratensis, also known as the Surat Justicia or Kalpasi, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Acanthaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in the management of diabetes. In terms of herbal preparations, Justicia suratensis is often used in the form of decoctions or infusions, and it can also be found in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicines.
